title: An Abandoned Russian Tanker Is Drifting at Sea. Will Anyone Stop It?
summary_full: An attack forced its crew to abandon ship in early March. No country has intervened, despite fears of environmental disaster.
summary_public: An attack forced its crew to abandon ship in early March. No country has intervened, despite fears of environmental disaster.

RU.label: negative
